landing.heroSubtitlePart1: Atlas FnA is the accounting and financial ERP built for the
landing.heroSubtitlePart2: Journal entries, financial statements, tax, treasury — everything is automated.
landing.modulesSubtitle: A complete suite covering all your accounting and financial needs.
landing.modAccountingDesc: OHADA chart of accounts, journals, general ledger, trial balance. Native compliance in 17 countries.
landing.modStatementsDesc: Balance sheet, income statement, TAFIRE, management balances & ratios — generated automatically in one click.
landing.modTaxDesc: VAT, corporate income tax, minimum tax, business licence. Tax calendar, alerts. DSF filing with 22 schedules.
landing.modTreasuryDesc: Smart bank reconciliation, cash, commercial paper, forecasts.
landing.modControllingDesc: OPEX & CAPEX budgeting, analytics cockpit, budget vs actual variances, waterfall, management P&L.
landing.modAssetsDesc: Asset register, SYSCOHADA depreciation, acquisitions, disposals, inventory, TAFIRE allocation.
landing.modThirdPartiesDesc: Customers, suppliers, aged balance, matching, collections, provisions.
landing.modClosingDesc: Period closings, adjustments, reversals, carry-forward, period lock.
landing.modAiDesc: Anomalies, suggestions, Benford audit, built-in LLM predictive analysis.
landing.modMultiCurrencyDesc: XAF, XOF, EUR, USD. Automatic translation differences (476/477).
landing.modAuditDesc: Tamper-proof audit trail, hash chain, full compliance.
landing.stepsSubtitle: From sign-up to your first balance sheet.
landing.step1Desc: Sign up in 2 minutes. No credit card required.
landing.step2Desc: The wizard loads the SYSCOHADA chart of accounts and configures everything.
landing.step3Desc: Intuitive interface with real-time debit = credit control.
landing.step4Desc: Balance sheet, income statement, TAFIRE, tax pack — everything is automatic.
landing.demoTitle: Try it before you sign up
landing.demoSubtitle: Guided tour, interactive demos and tutorials. See Atlas FnA in action.
landing.testimonial1Text: Atlas FnA has transformed our firm. SYSCOHADA compliance is native and we save 3 hours per file.
landing.testimonial2Text: Bank reconciliation and forecasting let us cut our closing time from 5 days to 2.
landing.testimonial3Text: Multi-company consolidation that used to take a week now takes an hour. Impressive.
landing.planSmbDesc: Complete accounting for a single company
landing.planSmbNote: ~75 EUR · 1 to 5 users · +9,000 FCFA per additional user
landing.planSmbFeat3: Tax (VAT, corporate income tax, minimum tax)
landing.planPremiumDesc: Multi-company, currencies, advanced AI, RBAC, API
landing.planPremiumNote: ~380 EUR · 20 users included · +7,000 FCFA per user · 50+ users or 5+ companies: Enterprise plan on quotation
landing.planPremiumFeat1: Everything in the SME plan, plus:
landing.faq1Q: Is Atlas FnA compliant with SYSCOHADA revised 2017?
landing.faq1A: Yes, 100%. Natively embedded OHADA chart of accounts, financial statements matching the official templates, and an audit trail meeting OHADA requirements.
landing.faq2Q: Can I try it before paying?
landing.faq2A: Subscribe now with all features included. No credit card required.
landing.faq3Q: Which payment methods do you accept?
landing.faq3A: Mobile Money (Orange Money, MTN MoMo, Wave), bank transfer, credit card (Visa, Mastercard). Billing in FCFA or EUR.
landing.faq4A: AES-256 encryption, daily backup, SHA-256 audit trail. GDPR and OHADA regulatory compliance.
landing.faq5Q: Can I migrate from another software?
landing.faq5A: CSV/Excel import of your journal entries, chart of accounts, third parties and fixed assets. Assisted migration available.
landing.faq6A: The desktop app works 100% offline with automatic synchronization once the connection is back.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join 500+ companies that trust Atlas FnA. Subscribe now.
landing.footerTagline: Accounting and financial ERP for Africa. SYSCOHADA compliant, intelligent and secure.

personnel.title: Personnel
personnel.subtitle: SYSCOHADA accounts 421–425 — IAS 19 Employee benefits
personnel.infoSyscohadaP1: Accounts 42x record the company's liabilities towards its employees (salaries, advances, deposits, profit sharing). They are liability accounts on the balance sheet.
personnel.infoSyscohadaP2: IAS 19 — Short-term employee benefits are recognised as expenses in the period in which the related services are rendered.
personnel.iasBullet1: Short-term benefits are recognised as expenses for the period
personnel.iasBullet2: Account 422: salaries payable not yet disbursed
personnel.iasBullet3: Account 421: salary advances — to be monitored (recommended IAS 19 ratio {'<'} 25%)

collab.dragAbandonBlocked: Cannot abandon by drag and drop (a reason is required).
collab.portfolioSubtitle: Every space starts from an accounting problem anchored to the general ledger and ends resolved. The method drives the variance to zero.
collab.kbPlaceholder: Knowledge base — search closed reports (e.g. "SGCI variance")…
collab.emptyDesc: A space is created from a concrete problem anchored to the general ledger: a bank reconciliation variance, a receivable to collect, a period closing. It converges to zero, then is archived with a binding report.
collab.spaceAbandonedToast: Space abandoned · removed from the active view (no report)
collab.feedEmpty: The thread is empty — state the problem, propose a solution.
collab.abandonConfirmDesc: It leaves the active view with no binding closing and no sealed report. Reversible (it can be reactivated).
collab.prophetStrictMode: · strict mode, figures from the general ledger
collab.searchEntryPh: Search a real document (no., account, label)…
collab.chainHint: The approval chain ({type} · {amount} FCFA) will be resolved by the tenant's matrix — cumulative approvals possible (e.g. CFO then CEO).
collab.autoCriterionInfo: Computed criterion — met automatically from the general ledger
collab.externalLinkSaasOnly: External link available in SaaS mode (server-side decision).
collab.errRoleRequired: Approval restricted to the role required for this step.
collab.errSodAuthor: Segregation of duties: the author cannot approve their own decision.
collab.errSodDistinct: Segregation of duties: distinct approvers per step.
collab.errNoGovernanceRule: No governance rule for this type/amount.
collab.fileTooLarge: File larger than 3 MB (v1 inline limit)
collab.diffusionHint: Who receives what, where — routing made visible (spec §8.4).
collab.rptNoneArchived: No detailed report archived for this space
collab.rptOnlyFingerprint: Spaces closed before the report was enabled only keep their fingerprint.
collab.requiredFields: Title, problem and objective are required
collab.anchorRequired: A space cannot exist without a business anchor
collab.problemPh: E.g. FCFA 14,120,000 of unexplained variances on account 521100 identified at the March closing by Finance.
collab.objectivePh: E.g. Bring the 521100 variance to zero, justified document by document.
collab.manualCriterionPh: E.g. Financial statements approved by Finance
collab.createHintPost: (never entered manually). An "account to clear" criterion is met automatically when the balance reaches zero.

recovery.noReminderRecorded: No reminder recorded. Reminders appear here as soon as an action is added to a collection case.
recovery.sendRegisteredMail: Send by registered mail with acknowledgement of receipt
recovery.letterIsFormalNotice: This letter constitutes a formal notice within the meaning of the legal provisions in force
recovery.letterL1Line1: We remind you that this invoice remains unpaid to date. This is most likely an oversight on your part.
recovery.letterL1Line2: We kindly ask you to settle this situation as soon as possible.
recovery.letterL1Line3: If payment has been made in the meantime, please disregard this message.
recovery.letterL2Line1: Despite our previous reminder, we note that the invoice referenced above remains unpaid.
recovery.letterL2Line3: Without a reply from you within this period, we will be obliged to initiate more stringent collection proceedings.
recovery.letterL3Line1: This is our FINAL AMICABLE NOTICE.
recovery.letterL3Line2: Despite our repeated reminders (emails, calls, letters), the invoice mentioned above remains unpaid.
recovery.letterL3Line3: Without full payment within 72 hours, your case will be automatically transferred to our litigation department
recovery.letterL3Line4: which will initiate the appropriate legal proceedings.
recovery.letterL4Line1: We hereby formally give you notice to pay
recovery.letterL4Line2: from receipt of this letter, the entire amount due.
recovery.letterL4Bullet1: We will initiate legal proceedings against you
recovery.letterL4Bullet2: Legal costs will be borne by you
recovery.letterL4Bullet3: Your commercial creditworthiness will be affected
recovery.letterL4Bullet4: A registration in the payment incident file may be made
recovery.letterL4Line4: This formal notice starts the accrual of statutory interest.
recovery.letterL5Line1: Your case has been transferred to our litigation department and to our law firm.
recovery.letterL5Line2: Legal proceedings will be initiated within 48 hours, including:
recovery.letterL5Line3: To avoid these proceedings, contact our department immediately:
recovery.securePayment: Secure payment by bank card or transfer
recovery.confidentialityNotice: This message and all attachments are confidential and intended solely for their recipients.
recovery.exclusionRulesIntro: These rules exclude certain customers from automatic reminders based on specific criteria.
recovery.excludeLitigationCustomers: Do not send reminders to customers in litigation
recovery.excludeLitigationCustomersDesc: Cases already transferred to the legal department are excluded
recovery.excludePlanCustomers: Do not send reminders to customers with an active repayment plan
recovery.excludePlanCustomersDesc: Customers complying with their payment plan are not reminded
recovery.excludeVipCustomers: Exclude VIP customers from automatic reminders
recovery.excludeVipCustomersDesc: Reminders for VIP customers are handled manually
recovery.excludeHolidays: Do not send reminders during public holidays
recovery.excludeHolidaysDesc: Automatically suspend reminders during national public holidays
recovery.excludeSmallAmountsDesc: Do not send reminders for amounts below 10,000 FCFA
recovery.respectBusinessHoursDesc: Send reminders only between 8 a.m. and 6 p.m.
recovery.noPenaltyRecorded: No penalty recorded. Create one with the calculator below.
recovery.penaltiesNeedApproval: All penalties must be approved by a manager before being sent to billing.
recovery.dragDropFilesHere: Drag and drop your files here
recovery.acceptedFormats: Accepted formats: PDF, DOC, DOCX, XLS, XLSX, JPG, PNG (Max 10MB)
recovery.noRepaymentPlan: No repayment plan. Plans are created from the collection cases.
recovery.invoicesWillMove: These invoices will be moved to collections
recovery.reasonBadFaith: Manifest bad faith of the debtor
recovery.transferNeedsFinanceManager: Transfer to litigation requires the Finance Manager's approval. Once approved, the case will be sent to the legal department for action.
recovery.financeManagerRefused: The Finance Manager refused the transfer of the case.
recovery.recoTrainingMbeki: Additional negotiation training for Paul MBEKI
recovery.recoWorkloadKouam: Workload redistribution: +15 cases for Marie KOUAM
